messages.content: # Getting #0 place every time you join the server and/or not able to set a new score? Follow this guide!

# Step 1:
> Ensure your **antivirus **/ **firewall **/ **ISP** are not blocking the connection.

> 1. **Antiviruses** -> Disable these or allow exceptions for Assetto Corsa and Content Manager

> 2. **Firewalls **-> Allow exceptions for Assetto Corsa and Content Manager [(click here for tutorial)](<https://www.belkin.com/au/support-article/?articleNum=8071>)

> 3. **ISPs** -> If this applies to you, most common for **Russian Users**, you will be required to use a **VPN** or **Proxy **to bypass this.

# Step 2:
> **Reinstall/ Install your CefSharp Plugin**

## Uninstall:
> 1. Press *windows+r*
> 2. Type `%localappdata%`
> 3. Open AcTools Content Manager
> 4. Open your Plugins folder
> 5. Delete the CefSharp folder

## Reinstall:
> 1. Open Content Manager > Settings > Content Manager > Plugins > Install CefSharp Version (114.2.120)
> 2. Close and Reopen Content Manager
> 
> If unable to -> <#1322234984181796934>

## VIDEO GUIDE

# Step 3:

> Make sure your computer clock settings are **correctly set, and synced.**

> Right-click the system clock in your **System Tray** at the bottom-right corner of the screen and click  **Adjust date/time** *(You can also go to Settings > Time & Language > Date & time.)*
### Ensure both `set timezone automatically` and `set time automatically` are ticked -> then press `sync now`.

-# **If any of these options are greyed out, please watch <https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPq2R-vxCTw> first.**

### A full explanation + other debugging steps can be found on the article: <https://www.makeuseof.com/tag/3-reasons-windows-computer-loses-time-date/>

# Step 4: 
If the above fixes did **NOT **work:
> 1. Install **0.2.7 CSP** (*Content Manager > Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > About & Updates*)
> 2. **Join a server, and your PB will start saving again.**

Only **after **doing the above, proceed with:
> 3. Install **0.2.11 CSP** (*Content Manager > Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > About & Updates*)

# Step 5:
If the above fixes did **NOT **work:
> You may need to additionally do <#1322234984181796934> and set it back up using the <#985372285668036639>

## Current Vaulted Cars - Do Not Count To LB - As of <t:1770408000:d>
https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1431142566589370548
